response:
I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in medical transcription, possessing strong knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as orthopedics, cardiology, gynecology, psychiatry, radiology, internal medicine, ENT, family medicine, neurology, dermatology, and more. I have excellent interpersonal skills, a strong team spirit, and a willingness to learn and develop new competencies. I am reliable, dependable, and often seek new responsibilities within diverse employment settings. I excel at supervising, transcribing, and managing customer relationships, consistently exceeding productivity to support organizational success.  

Experience includes roles as a medical scribe and editor at V Transcriptions LLC, S10 Healthcare Solutions Ltd, and other organizations, where I demonstrated strong editing skills, attention to detail, and adherence to turnaround times. I have also served as a supervisor and customer relationship executive in the glass industry, where I managed a team of 10 and streamlined customer service processes.  

I am a quality-focused professional with a background in medical transcription, and I am proficient in Word, Excel, Outlook, EHR systems, and email. I am adaptable, computer-savvy, and passionate about continuous improvement. I am an enthusiastic learner and a team leader who thrives in dynamic environments.  

I am an Indian national with an On Visit visa and am eager to contribute to a healthcare organization with my expertise in medical transcription. I am available for a professional cover letter that highlights my skills and experience in a concise and impactful manner.
